title: Pterostylis psammophilus
taxonomy: Pterostylis psammophilus is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This terrestrial orchid is a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae. The specific classification of Pterostylis psammophilus is further detailed in the family Orchidaceae, where it is placed within the tribe Cranichideae. intro: Pterostylis psammophilus, also known as the desert greenhood orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid that belongs to the Pterostylis genus. The health benefits of Pterostylis psammophilus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, infections, and skin irritations.
